files_touched.changes: Added a primary chord-track motif accent hook that resolves section motif assignments and reuses accent patterns as subtle onset-group velocity contours in both strategy and fallback chord paths while failing open on lookup or accent issues.
Added deterministic integration proofs for chord-track onset-group motif accent contouring and fail-open behavior when section motif lookup is unusable.
Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 3 completion, marked Milestone 1 complete, and pointed follow-on work to Milestone 2 tension-authority changes.

Added dedicated Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks for ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional so those genres no longer collapse to the generic motif path when the motif library is empty or has no direct match.

Added Ethiopian-family motif mappings aligned to the real arrangement templates and expanded motif-aware melody participation for mapped Ethiopian-family sections only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().
Added an Ethiopian-family-only bass velocity contour hook that reuses section motif accent patterns without changing bass pitch or timing and fails open when motif lookup is unavailable.
Extended genre-specific motif fallback coverage to ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional.
Added Ethiopian-family mapping alignment and motif-aware melody enablement coverage while preserving plain create_arrangement defaults.
Added cinematic pre_chorus motif playback proof, Ethiopian bass accent-pattern wiring proof, and corrected the cinematic expectation to match scale-snapped melody output in C minor.
Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 2 completion, updated milestone status to slices 1-2 complete, and narrowed the remaining Milestone 1 follow-up work.
Added dedicated motif fallbacks for cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul so those genres no longer collapse to the generic motif path when the library has no direct match.

Aligned classical motif mappings with real section names, added fragment transform support, cloned mapping assignments defensively, and enabled motif-aware melody participation for thematic non-chorus sections inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().
Generalized motif melody lookup to any melody-enabled section and moved section counters ahead of the melody gate so repeated sections like verse_2 stay aligned with arrangement motif assignments.
Added regressions proving cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul use dedicated motif fallbacks instead of the plain generic identity.
Added fragment, classical mapping, isolated mapping copy, and motif-aware non-chorus melody enablement coverage for the motif-depth slice.
Added verse_2 integration coverage proving non-chorus repeated sections resolve the correct motif assignment in the melody track.
Updated Milestone 1 status/checklist and recorded the completed Slice 1 execution log with focused verification results and follow-up risks.
Created a durable implementation tracker capturing the current code-grounded musicality roadmap, milestone ordering, acceptance criteria, and preferred supervisor-builder-verifier execution model.
Added first-class neo_soul normalization/default coverage so neo_soul no longer depends on adjacent genre defaults
Added dedicated neo_soul motif and arrangement template so arranger no longer falls back to trap_soul for neo_soul prompts
Included neo_soul in fallback instrument preload and per-stem processing gates for warmer R&B-like runtime routing
Added dedicated neo_soul gain-staging template and alias handling so neo_soul avoids trap fallback
Added conservative rendered-audio target profiles for rnb, trap_soul, house, ambient, ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional
Added scorer regressions proving the expanded genre set no longer uses the 0.75 unknown-genre path
Added neo_soul normalization/default coverage tests
Added neo_soul arrangement coverage so motif/template behavior is no longer validated only through fallback
Added neo_soul gain-staging regression to prove the genre uses dedicated staging instead of trap fallback
Inspected reference-profile frequency bands and mastering-oriented spectral analysis to assess reuse potential for broader genre validation
Confirmed genre-specific spectral guardrails exist but are still advisory and not consistently wired into rendering or acceptance
Confirmed sonic fingerprints include pitch and spectral descriptors, but those features are not yet used for key-aware or role-band-aware validation
Promoted neo_soul to a first-class parsed genre and removed the lingering InstrumentResolutionService annotation diagnostic
Added explicit neo_soul output-analysis targets and onset-density scoring so neo-soul no longer passes on a neutral unknown-genre fallback
Producer now requires rendered-audio validation when audio exists and will not accept critic-bypass success if output analysis fails
Inspected rendered-audio analysis scoring and confirmed neo_soul falls through to the neutral unknown-genre score path
Inspected success criteria and confirmed ProducerAgent does not hard-gate on rendered-audio output analysis
Confirmed live neo_soul render report recorded genre_match_score=0.75 and passed=true despite the missing neo_soul scorer profile
Added structured track-planning mode so Producer can use real Researcher handoffs for per-track decomposition
Replaced synthetic per-track planning calls with Producer-to-Researcher handoffs and recorded handoff-backed telemetry
Added render report regression coverage for mastering fields and limiter ceiling diagnostics
Moved critic bypass to final attempt only and added heuristic score-plan refinement for BKAS, ADC, and VLC failures
Added supported model fallback selection, in-place score-plan repair, and render-safe duration fitting for producer plans
Added verifier-side model fallback selection for preflight score plan review
Fixed latent IndexError bug: compute_vlc now filters empty voicings before processing
Rewritten with 6 wiring tests: voice_leading_wired, style_policy_genre_dna, quality_gate_extraction, preference_loop, quality_gate_known_good
Tightened 2 assertions (pitch-class subset, root note validation) + 2 new tests (invalid chord, empty progression)
Added 5 edge-case tests: vlc_empty_list, vlc_single_voicing, vlc_empty_voicing_skipped, bkas_empty_bass, bkas_empty_kicks
Tightened 2 assertions + new test_unknown_genre_raises
Tightened signal_count assertion + new test_corrupted_json_recovery
Tightened embed dimension to == 384, similarity to > 0.1

changes_made.description: Added conservative chord-track motif reuse for Milestone 1 Slice 3
changes_made.diff_summary: The primary Chords track now optionally resolves the section motif and applies a subtle shared onset-level velocity contour from the motif accent pattern across both strategy-generated and fallback chord notes, without changing harmony, timing, or voicing behavior.

changes_made.description: Added chord-track motif contour and fail-open regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New deterministic integration tests prove chord onset groups inherit motif accent contouring consistently across strategy and fallback chord paths and that unusable motif lookups leave chord generation unchanged.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 3 and closed Milestone 1
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated the tracker to mark Milestone 1 complete after the final low-risk chord-track reuse slice and documented the focused proof plus carry-forward risks.

changes_made.description: Added Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks for Milestone 1 Slice 2
changes_made.diff_summary: MotifGenerator now dispatches dedicated fallback generators for ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional before the generic motif path, with genre-specific names, tags, rhythms, and accent patterns.

changes_made.description: Wired Ethiopian-family motif mappings and scoped melody broadening
changes_made.diff_summary: Added section-correct motif mappings for Ethiopian-family templates and extended motif-aware melody enablement only for mapped Ethiopian-family sections inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs(), leaving plain create_arrangement defaults unchanged.

changes_made.description: Added conservative Ethiopian-family bass motif reuse
changes_made.diff_summary: Bass generation now optionally contours note velocities from section motif accent patterns for Ethiopian-family motif-aware arrangements while preserving pitch, timing, and fail-open behavior.

changes_made.description: Extended motif fallback regressions to Ethiopian-family genres
changes_made.diff_summary: The parametrized fallback test now proves Ethiopian-family genres return dedicated motif identities instead of the generic motif path and still convert cleanly to MIDI notes.

changes_made.description: Added Ethiopian-family arrangement wiring regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests prove Ethiopian-family motif mappings match actual arrangement sections and that motif-aware melody enablement broadens only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().

changes_made.description: Added cinematic and Ethiopian motif integration proofs
changes_made.diff_summary: New integration tests prove cinematic pre_chorus motif sequencing reaches the melody track with scale snapping and that Ethiopian motif accents shape bass velocities without changing bass pitch or timing.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 2 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated Milestone 1 to slices 1-2 complete and added an execution log covering Ethiopian-family motif depth, conservative bass reuse, focused test proof, and residual risks.

changes_made.description: Added dedicated fallback motifs for the first Milestone 1 genre slice
changes_made.diff_summary: MotifGenerator now normalizes genre keys and uses dedicated algorithmic motif generators for cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul before falling back to the generic motif path.

changes_made.description: Expanded motif-aware section coverage and repaired classical mapping alignment
changes_made.diff_summary: Classical motif mappings now match intro/verse/variation/chorus/outro, fragment transform support was added, motif assignments are cloned defensively, and motif-aware arrangements can opt intro/verse/pre_chorus/bridge/outro into melody without changing create_arrangement defaults.

changes_made.description: Made motif playback available to any melody-enabled section
changes_made.diff_summary: The melody track now attempts motif lookup for any melody-enabled section and updates section counters before gating so repeated names like verse_2 remain aligned with arranger-generated motif assignments.

changes_made.description: Locked in genre-specific motif fallback behavior
changes_made.diff_summary: Added parametrized coverage proving cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul fallbacks are not the generic motif identity and still convert cleanly to MIDI notes.

changes_made.description: Added focused regressions for motif-aware arrangement behavior
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests cover fragment retrieval, classical section-name alignment, defensive motif-mapping copies, and scoped non-chorus melody enablement in motif-aware arrangements.

changes_made.description: Added repeated non-chorus motif playback coverage
changes_made.diff_summary: A new integration test proves a melody-enabled second verse resolves motif_assignments['verse_2'] and emits the expected motif-derived pitches.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 1 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated Milestone 1 to in-progress with slice-1-complete status, checked its verification boxes, and added an execution log covering scope, files, test proofs, and remaining work.

changes_made.description: Added a new masterclass musicality tracker for future phased implementation
changes_made.diff_summary: Documented source-of-truth findings, milestone sequencing, acceptance criteria, and the recommended recursive-supervisor/recursive-builder/recursive-verifier execution pattern for autopilot-driven work.

changes_made.description: Enabled real per-track subagent decomposition through Researcher handoffs
changes_made.diff_summary: Researcher now supports a narrow structured track-planning mode, letting Producer record genuine handoffs for drums/bass/keys/lead/pad/fx instead of internal-only telemetry

changes_made.description: Switched per-track decomposition to actual orchestration handoffs
changes_made.diff_summary: Producer now hands each track plan to Researcher with session-backed handoff history and merges the structured per-track plan back into the score plan before generation

changes_made.description: Locked in mastering diagnostics report contract
changes_made.diff_summary: Regression test now asserts target_lufs, master_ceiling_db, stem_headroom_db, brightness_target, warmth_target, and the true_peak_limiter stage string are preserved in render reports

changes_made.description: Made producer refinement loop real instead of bypassing on the first critic failure
changes_made.diff_summary: Critic-gate bypass now only happens on the final attempt, and failed critics trigger heuristic groove/arrangement/voice-leading adjustments before the model refines the score plan

changes_made.description: Hardened producer planning to preserve user intent and fit within current server runtime limits
changes_made.diff_summary: Changed director/verifier defaults to supported Copilot models, added model fallback chain, repaired invalid optional plan fields, and compressed oversized arrangements to explicit/render-safe bar counts

changes_made.description: Made score-plan preflight resilient to unsupported model defaults
changes_made.diff_summary: Added verifier model fallback chain so preflight review stays active when the preferred model is unavailable

changes_made.description: Added get_ticks_per_bar() helper function for dynamic bar length calculation
changes_made.diff_summary: +18 lines: get_ticks_per_bar() calculates ticks per bar for any time signature including compound meters (6/8→1440, 12/8→2880). Also added time_signature: (6, 8) to ethio_jazz GENRE_DEFAULTS

changes_made.description: Extract time_signature from GENRE_DEFAULTS during prompt parsing
changes_made.diff_summary: +4 lines: Look up genre in GENRE_DEFAULTS and extract time_signature, defaulting to (4, 4). Pass to ParsedPrompt constructor

changes_made.description: Updated generate_ethiopian_drum_pattern() to use dynamic time signature
changes_made.diff_summary: +10 lines: Added time_signature parameter with (6, 8) default, calculate ticks_per_bar dynamically using get_ticks_per_bar(), updated all pulse calculations for eskista, traditional, ethio_jazz, and default styles

changes_made.description: Pass time_signature to generate_ethiopian_drum_pattern() from parsed prompt
changes_made.diff_summary: Modified 4 generate_drums() methods to pass parsed.time_signature parameter

verifications.details: Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (6 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (43 passed), tests/test_sprint7_wiring.py (10 passed), and the combined subset run (59 passed). A baseline-aware verifier pass confirmed the new Slice 3 behavior stayed bounded to primary chord-track onset-group velocity contouring plus fail-open wiring on top of the accepted Slice 1/2 baseline.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_engine.py (60 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (43 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (4 passed), and the combined subset run (107 passed). Post-verifier inspection confirmed dedicated Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks, section-correct Ethiopian-family motif mappings, scoped motif-aware melody broadening only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs(), and velocity-only Ethiopian-family bass reuse with fail-open behavior.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_engine.py (56 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (37 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (2 passed), and the combined subset run (95 passed). Post-verifier inspection confirmed genre-specific motif fallbacks, classical section-name alignment, fragment transform support, scoped motif-aware non-chorus melody enablement, and repeated-section counter alignment without changing plain create_arrangement defaults.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_output_analyzer.py, tests/test_genre_normalization.py, tests/test_arranger_motifs.py, and tests/test_sprint11_batch_b.py (122 passed, 2 skipped). Post-verifier inspection confirmed neo_soul now has explicit defaults, arrangement, renderer, and gain-staging coverage, and that rnb, trap_soul, house, ambient, ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional now have explicit AUDIO_GENRE_TARGETS entries. Residual risk: no direct executing test yet covers the new neo_soul branches inside audio_renderer.py; those paths were verified by code inspection only.

verifications.target: genre realism and frequency-awareness roadmap analysis
verifications.details: Parallel Explore subagents plus direct file inspection converged on three main truths: 1) rendered-audio scoring still has coverage gaps for several parseable genres, 2) instrument-aware realism exists mainly in MIDI/register space rather than audio role-band validation, and 3) the best implementation path is to unify existing analyzers and normalization before adding deeper listener models.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_output_analyzer.py and tests/test_prompt_parser_key.py. A stubbed ProducerAgent smoke harness showed that critics passing with outputAnalysis.passed=false now yields COMPLETED_WITH_CRITIC_FAIL, while the same path with outputAnalysis.passed=true yields COMPLETED_SUCCESS.

Code inspection showed that ProducerAgent success is controlled by MIDI critics, while rendered-audio analysis is advisory only. OutputAnalyzer lacks a neo_soul target profile, and recent neo_soul render reports consistently show genre_match_score=0.75 with passed=true, matching the scorer's unknown-genre fallback.

verifications.target: copilot-liku-cli producer per-track handoff decomposition plus mastering propagation
verifications.details: Bounded producer run completed through the shared PythonBridge with 6 real Producer->Researcher handoffs (drums, bass, keys, lead, pad, fx). The generated render report consumed mastering values target_lufs=-15, master_ceiling_db=-0.5, stem_headroom_db=-7, brightness_target=0, warmth_target=1 and reported true_peak_limiter=ceiling=-0.5dBTP.

Focused pytest run passed for tests/test_score_plan_adapter.py and tests/test_render_report_schema.py (5 tests total), covering structured mastering extraction plus render report mastering diagnostics.

With maxIterations=2 and allowQualityGateBypass=true, the producer executed attempt_1 and attempt_2 before bypass. attempt_2 plan changed drum and bass pattern guidance, reduced lead/fx activation in lower-energy sections, and refined tension/chord choices while preserving the requested 16-bar D minor neo-soul structure.

verifications.target: copilot-liku-cli producer regression after model/fallback fixes
verifications.details: Producer preserved 88 BPM, D minor, and requested drums/bass/Rhodes/muted guitar/pad/fx track roles. Initial oversized plan timed out at 300s; after duration fitting, a 16-bar neo-soul plan rendered successfully in ~105s.

verifications.target: copilot-liku-cli agent module syntax after hardening
verifications.details: Node module load check succeeded for producer.js and verifier.js with no syntax or runtime import errors.

verifications.target: Sprint 5 production code — Gemini synthesis audit
verifications.details: All 7 deliverables CORRECT. No dead code, no crash paths, all guard clauses present. HarmonicBrain wiring verified, PolicyContext consumption verified, GenreDNA overlay verified, quality gate verified, scale-snap verified, preference defaults verified.

verifications.target: Sprint 5 test suite — GPT adversarial stress-test
verifications.details: 0/5 wiring points tested, 12 trivially-passing assertions, latent IndexError in compute_vlc([[]]). test_intelligence_integration.py could pass with all Sprint 5 features deleted.

verifications.target: Sprint 5 diagnostician fixes — production bug + test hardening
verifications.details: 1 production bug fixed (compute_vlc empty voicing guard). 48 tests total: 12 trivial assertions tightened, 11 edge-case tests added, 5 wiring tests added. All 5 Sprint 5 wiring points now verified.
